section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports neck pain. The doctor reports pain. The patient reports headaches. The patient reports occasional dizziness. The patient reports numbness. The patient reports body pain. The patient reports pain. The patient reports fatigue.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These are patient-reported symptoms and history elements rather than objective exam or test findings; placing them in Findings blurs the distinction between subjective history and objective examination.
This is more a description of the clinician's activity/observation than a diagnostic impression or problem list; it does not clearly state a diagnosis or synthesized assessment.
